debug_info.goal:
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
φ : Formula ℕ
hφ : φ ∈ L
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ)
h₁ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
h₂ : Γ.conj ➝ Γ.conj ⋏ φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
this : Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
⊢ Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT

failed_attempts:
have hφ_in_U : φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
        apply mem_omega_of_mem

exfalso;
      let P (i : ℕ) := ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)), ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory
      have hP : ∀ i, P i := by
        intro i; induction i with
        | zero =>
          intro Γ hΓ hC
          have : χ ➝ Γ.conj ∈ T.theory := by
            induction Γ using Finset.induction with
            | empty => simp; apply T.mem_of_provable; try apply verum; try apply axiomVerum; sorry
            | insert a s ha ih =>
              simp_all [Set.insert_subset_iff]
              apply T.mem_trans (ψ := (χ ➝ a) ⋏ (χ ➝ s.conj))
              . apply T.mem_of_provable

exfalso
      have consistent : ∀ i (Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ)), ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT i → Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
        intro i
        induction i with
        | zero =>
          intro Δ hΔ
          simp [construction] at hΔ
          have : χ ➝ Δ.conj ∈ T.theory := by
            rw [T.iff_mem_CorsiDeducible]
            rw [T.iff_mem_CorsiDeducible] at hΔ
            grind
          intro hC
          apply hT
          apply T.mem_trans this hC
        | succ i ih =>
          intro Δ hΔ
          cases h : decode i with
          | none =>
            simp [construction, h] at hΔ
            apply ih _ hΔ
          | some δ =>
            simp [construction, h] at hΔ
            split_ifs at hΔ with h_cond
            . by_cases hδ : δ ∈ Δ
              . have : (Δ.erase δ).conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by
                  apply T.imp_closed (φ := Δ.conj)
                  . grind
                  . assumption
                refine h_cond (Δ.erase δ) ?_ this
                intro x hx
                specialize hΔ (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hx)
                simp at hΔ
                cases hΔ
                . subst hΔ
